name: Pork Apple Pie
recipeInstructions: Combine pork, apples, sage, salt, and pepper in a deep bowl and toss until thoroughly mixed. Spread the mixture evenly in a 9-inch glass pie plate. Pour cider over the mixture. Sprinkle sugar on top. Dot with butter. Drape pastry dough carefully over the pie. Trim off excess dough, crimp edges. Cut a 1-inch vent in the center. Brush the surface with a few tablespoons of beaten egg. Bake the pie at 350°F for 1-1/2 hours or until the crust is golden brown, brushing the top twice more with beaten egg. Serve in baking dish.
